creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

Author: ak
Date: Thu Jul 26 12:33:10 2012
New Revision: 301560
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301560

Log:
  - Update to version 0.14.2
  - Add conflict with misc/gplink [1]
  
  PR:	ports/170083
  Submitted by:	Tijl Coosemans <tijl@coosemans.org> (maintainer)
  Reported by: Sulev-Madis 'ketas' Silber <madis555.hot.ee> [1]

Modified:
  head/devel/gputils/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/gputils/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/gputils/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/gputils/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/gputils/Makefile	Thu Jul 26 10:43:38 2012	(r301559)
+++ head/devel/gputils/Makefile	Thu Jul 26 12:33:10 2012	(r301560)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	gputils
-PORTVERSION=	0.14.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.14.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -15,7 +15,9 @@ COMMENT=	A set of utilities for Microchi
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
+CONFLICTS=	gplink-[0-9]*
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
 
 MANLANG=	"" fr
 MAN1=		gpasm.1 gpdasm.1 gplib.1 gplink.1 gpstrip.1 gputils.1 \
